title: nervilia oxyglossa
intro: Nervilia oxyglossa, also known as the Tongue orchid or Tongue Nervilia, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Nervilia oxyglossa include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a topical treatment for wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Nervilia oxyglossa is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its use is not extensively documented in Western medicine, and more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
